word: G346 - ἀνακεφαλαίομαι - anakephalaíomai - an-ak-ef-al-ah'-ee-om-ahee - Briefly comprehend

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀνακεφαλαίομαι

- Transliteration: Anakephalaiomai

- Phonetic: an-ak-ef-al-ah'-ee-om-ahee

- Definition:

1. to sum up (again), to repeat summarily, to condense into a summary

- Origin: from G303 and G2775 (in its original sense)

- TDNT entry: 14:21,4

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G303 and G2775 (in its original sense); to sum up: - briefly comprehend gather together in one.
